data.title: Crypto Themed After Baby Hippo 'Moo Deng' Leaves Dogecoin, Shiba Inu In The Dust, Zooms 84% After Coinbase Announces Listing Plans
data.description: Meme coin inspired by adorable baby hippo “Moo Deng” skyrocketed on Monday after America's largest cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase added it to its listing roadmap.

data.title: Peter Schiff Says The Bitcoin Reserve Bill Gets Plenty Of Attention, But Not On Capitol Hill — Questions Lack Of Co-Sponsors
data.description: Renowned economist Peter Schiff, on Monday, questioned the government’s plans to set up a strategic Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) reserve, pointing out the lack of support in Congress.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts S&P 500 To Reach 6,300, Bitcoin To Break $100K By Year-End, Says Trump's Tariffs Can Be Effective 'Negotiating Tools'
data.description: On Monday, Tom Lee, Chief Investment Officer at Fundstrat Capital, predicted that the S&P 500 tracked by SPDR S&P 500 (NYSE:SPY) will rally to 6,300 by year-end, citing favorable market conditions

data.title: Trump Says He Will Make US Steel 'Great Again' Through Tariffs, Cautions Nippon Steel: 'Buyer Beware!'
data.description: On Monday, Dec. 2, 2024, Trump opposed Nippon Steel's $14.1B bid for U.S. Steel, pledging tariffs and tax incentives to block the deal and bolster domestic industry.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Monday Moves: $4.8M Spotify Stock Sale Meets $4.7M Pinterest Shopping Spree
data.description: On Monday December 2, 2024, Cathie Wood's Ark Invest made key portfolio moves, selling shares of Spotify and buying shares of Pinterest, alongside other trades in tech and biotech stocks.
